actionUnits.condition: Manually open the tab to ensure page instantiation and fade-in transition. TabSimple has MonoBehaviour (fileID: 904, guid: c2bcf79fd38b2441fa17fde42cfce34d) = Tab with pagePrefab (guid: e749a5bf695bb464390eb1ffd27aba4f, fileID: 1905160441634000) and cachePage = false. UIFadeTransition is present (MonoBehaviour fileID: 903, guid: a4ab599ee1dbcea41b165ae5170d9f03) with durationSeconds = 0.25, transitionInDelaySeconds = 0.1875, transitionOutDelaySeconds = 0.0. This trigger ensures Tab.Open() runs SetOpen(true) -> EnablePage() -> IUITransition.TransitionIn(Page).
